title: GDK reported error, BATproject: does not match always when running queries
poc:
CREATE TABLE import
 (
 	d varchar(10),
 	t varchar(8),
 	price NUMERIC(11, 5),
 	amount INTEGER
 );

CREATE TABLE md
 (
 	ts TIMESTAMP,
 	symbol varchar(50),
 	price NUMERIC(11, 5),
         amount INTEGER,
 	source TINYINT
 );
insert into md select str_to_timestamp(d || t, '%m/%d/%Y%H:%M:%S'), 'X', price, amount, 1 from import;
select * from md where symbol='anySymbol' limit 10;
select symbol, count(*) from md group by symbol;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent query results after data manipulation operations
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE sales (
 	id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
 	product_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
 	quantity INTEGER CHECK (quantity >= 0),
 	price NUMERIC(10, 2) NOT NULL,
 	created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
INSERT INTO sales (product_name, quantity, price) VALUES ('Widget', 10, 19.99);
INSERT INTO sales (product_name, quantity, price) VALUES ('Gadget', 5, 29.99);
SELECT product_name, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM sales GROUP BY product_name HAVING total_quantity > 0;
DELETE FROM sales WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';
